title: 使用idea创建springboot项目并创建项目模板工程
content:
## 使用idea创建SpringBoot项目

### 1.打开idea-> Create New Project

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/1.png)

### 2.选择Spring Initalizr

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/2.png)

### 3.填入自定义的Group和Artifact，其他内容根据自己需求更改，这里均使用默认值

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/3.png)

### 4.选择合适的SpringBoot 和需要的依赖，这里选择的依赖有Lombok、SpringBootDevTools，因为要创建web项目，所以还选择了webStarter

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/4.png)

### 5.选择项目在本地保存的位置和项目名称

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/5.png)

## 现在项目已经创建成功，项目开始初始化，接下来开始进行配置

### 1.修改pom.xml，增加自定义依赖，这里主要添加了jdbc、mybatis、druid数据库连接池以及fastjson的依赖，并添加了编译打包的插件：

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>2.0.7.RELEASE</version>
        <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository -->
    </parent>
    <groupId>com.aias</groupId>
    <artifactId>demo</artifactId>
    <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>
    <name>demo</name>
    <description>Demo project for Spring Boot</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>1.8</java.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-devtools</artifactId>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
            <optional>true</optional>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <optional>true</optional>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <!-- alibaba的druid数据库连接池 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.alibaba</groupId>
            <artifactId>druid-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
            <version>1.1.1</version>
        </dependency>
        <!-- mysql驱动 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>mysql</groupId>
            <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <!-- mybatis -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.mybatis.spring.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>mybatis-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
            <version>2.1.0</version>
        </dependency>
        <!-- Spring Boot JDBC -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-jdbc</artifactId>
        </dependency>
         <!-- fastjson -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.alibaba</groupId>
            <artifactId>fastjson</artifactId>
            <version>1.2.49</version>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <defaultGoal>compile</defaultGoal>
        <resources>
            <resource>
                <!-- mapper文件 -->
                <directory>${basedir}/src/main/java</directory>
                <targetPath>${basedir}/target/classes</targetPath>
                <includes>
                    <include>**/*.xml</include>
                </includes>
            </resource>
            <resource>
                <!-- 其他资源文件 -->
                <directory>${basedir}/src/main/resources</directory>
                <includes>
                    <include>**/**</include>
                </includes>
                <filtering>false</filtering>
            </resource>
        </resources>
        <plugins>
            <!-- 打包插件 -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <executable>true</executable>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>repackage</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

```

### ### 2.修改配置文件application.properties

```properties
#端口
server.port = 8080
#此项目的服务名称
spring.application.name = demoSpringBoot
#jdbc配置
#datasource配置
spring.datasource.type = com.alibaba.druid.pool.DruidDataSource
#驱动
spring.datasource.driver-class-name = com.mysql.jdbc.Driver
#数据库连接地址
spring.datasource.url = jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/aias?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf-8&zeroDateTimeBehavior=convertToNull&transformedBitIsBoolean=true&allowMultiQueries=true&&useSSL=true
#连接用户名
spring.datasource.username = root
#连接密码
spring.datasource.password = 123456
# druid配置
# 初始化大小，最小，最大
spring.datasource.druid.initialSize = 5
spring.datasource.druid.minIdle = 5
spring.datasource.druid.maxActive = 20
# 配置获取连接等待超时的时间
spring.datasource.druid.maxWait = 60000
# 配置间隔多久才进行一次检测，检测需要关闭的空闲连接，单位是毫秒
spring.datasource.druid.timeBetweenEvictionRunsMillis = 60000
# 配置一个连接在池中最小生存的时间，单位是毫秒
spring.datasource.druid.minEvictableIdleTimeMillis = 300000
# 校验SQL，Oracle配置 spring.datasource.validationQuery=SELECT 1 FROM DUAL，如果不配validationQuery项，则下面三项配置无用
spring.datasource.druid.validationQuery = SELECT 1 from dual
spring.datasource.druid.testWhileIdle = true
spring.datasource.druid.testOnBorrow = false
spring.datasource.druid.testOnReturn = false
# 打开PSCache，并且指定每个连接上PSCache的大小
spring.datasource.druid.poolPreparedStatements = true
spring.datasource.druid.filters = stat,log4j2
#mybatis配置
#驼峰转换
mybatis.configuration.map-underscore-to-camel-case = true
#mapper位置
mybatis.mapper-locations = classpath*:com/aias/**/bean/*Mapper.xml

```



### 3.添加dao层注解扫描，在启动的Application类上添加注解@MapperScan("com.aias.demo.admin.dao")

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/6.png)

## 添加简单的代码，启动项目进行调用

[demoSpringBoot](https://github.com/Aias00/demoSpringBoot)

## 将代码项目设置为模板工程

### idea菜单栏 -> Tools -> Save Project as Template 

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/7.png)

### 添加template成功后会出现提示框

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/8.png)

## 以后需要重新创建新的项目进行开发时，可以通过自定义的模板进行创建

### 打开idea -> create new project -> user-defined

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/9.png)

###  找到之前保存的模板名，点击next

![](create-SpringBoot-project-by-idea-and-create-project-template/10.png)

### 修改成想要的项目名称，点击finish，这样一个新的springboot项目就创建成功了

title: 修改基于springmvc的web项目用maven-tomcat插件启动
content:
### 1.打开之前的demo工程

[使用idea创建 springMVC + MyBatis + jsp 的web项目](https://aias00.github.io/2019/08/20/start-ssm-project-by-idea/)

### 2.修改pom文件<build>内容如下

```

<build>
        <resources>
            <resource>
                <directory>${basedir}/src/main/resources</directory>
                <includes>
                    <include>**/*</include>
                </includes>
            </resource>
            <resource>
                <directory>${basedir}/src/main/java</directory>
                <includes>
                    <include>**/*.xml</include>
                </includes>
            </resource>
        </resources>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <source>1.8</source>
                    <target>1.8</target>
                    <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.tomcat.maven</groupId>
                <artifactId>tomcat7-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>2.2</version>
                <configuration>
                    <path>/</path>
                    <port>8090</port>
                    <uriEncoding>UTF-8</uriEncoding>
                    <url>http://localhost:8090/</url>
                    <server>Tomcat7</server>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <phase>package</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>run</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

        </plugins>
    </build>

```

### 3.idea右上角菜单栏->Edit Configuration -> 点击 + 号添加maven，在command line中填写  tomcat7:run

![](change-maven-war-plugin/1.png)

### 4.启动即可

### 5.命令
    tomcat7:deploy  --部署一个web war包
    tomcat7:reload  --重新加载web war包
    tomcat7:start    --启动tomcat
    tomcat7:stop    --停止tomcat
    tomcat7:undeploy--停止一个war包
    tomcat7:run 启动嵌入式tomcat ，并运行当前项目
    如果需要debug，就使用debug as 方式启动项目！

title: 使用idea创建 springMVC + MyBatis + jsp 的web项目
content:
### 1.打开idea，新建项目 ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/1.png) ### 2.左侧选中maven，勾选 Create from archetype，在列表中找到 maven-archetype-webapp ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/2.png) ### 3.填写 GroupId 和 ArtifactId ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/3.png) ### 4.填写maven配置，主要设置 User setting file (本地maven配置文件) 和 Local respository (本地仓库位置) ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/4.png) ### 5.填写项目名称和项目路径 ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/5.png) ### 6.进入编辑模式，如果弹出 Maven projects need to be imported，选择 Enable Auto-import即可，以后更改pom文件后就会自动下载依赖包了 ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/6.png) ### 7.将生成的pom文件中的 build 内容删除，之后按需求自己配置，目前为止整个项目的目录结构是这样的 ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/7.png) ### 8.点击菜单栏上的 File-> Project Structure-> Project Settings-> Modules，在 src/main 下点击右键-> New Folder，新建两个文件夹:java 和 resources ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/8.png) ### 9.将新建的java文件夹设置成Sources ,新建的 resources文件夹设置成Resources，具体操作：点击java文件夹，点击上面的Sources 按钮。 ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/9.png) ### 10.在pom文件中添加我们需要的依赖，主要包括spring核心依赖，spingMVC依赖，mybatis的相关依赖，jsp的依赖，servlet的依赖，数据库连接池(本文选用druid)的依赖，为了简化操作，首先在中指定spring的版本，主要配置如下 ``` UTF-8 1.8 1.8 5.1.8.RELEASE junit junit 4.11 test org.springframework spring-context ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-core ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-beans ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-context-support ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-aop ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-aspects ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-expression ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-tx ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-expression ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-jdbc ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-web ${spring.version} org.springframework spring-webmvc ${spring.version} mysql mysql-connector-java 5.1.31 org.mybatis mybatis 3.4.6 org.mybatis mybatis-spring 1.3.2 com.alibaba druid 1.1.10 javax.servlet javax.servlet-api 4.0.1 provided javax.servlet jstl 1.2 com.alibaba fastjson 1.2.49 ``` ### 11.在resources文件夹下创建配置文件：applicationContext.xml，applicationContext-beans.xml，applicationContext-jdbc.xml，applicationContext-mybatis.xml，spring-mvc.xml，jdbc.properties，mybatis.cfg.xml。具体代码如下： * applicationContext.xml ``` ``` * applicationContext-beans.xml ``` ``` * applicationContext-jdbc.xml ``` ``` * applicationContext-mybatis.xml ``` ``` * mybatis.cfg.xml ``` ``` * jdbc.properties ``` jdbc.driverClassName=com.mysql.jdbc.Driver jdbc.url=jdbc\:mysql\://localhost:3306/idea?Unicode\=true&characterEncoding\=utf-8&zeroDateTimeBehavior\=convertToNull&transformedBitIsBoolean\=true&allowMultiQueries\=true jdbc.username=root jdbc.password=123456 ``` ### 12.修改web.xml文件。 ``` demoWeb contextConfigLocation classpath*:/applicationContext.xml org.springframework.web.util.Log4jConfigListener org.springframework.web.context.ContextLoaderListener characterEncodingFilter org.springframework.web.filter.CharacterEncodingFilter encoding UTF-8 forceEncoding true characterEncodingFilter /* springmvc org.springframework.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet contextConfigLocation classpath:spring-mvc.xml springmvc / ``` ### 13. 在webapp文件夹下新建jsp文件夹，将原本生成的 index.jsp 移动到jsp文件夹下。 * index.jsp ``` <%@ page language="java" contentType="text/html; charset=UTF-8" pageEncoding="UTF-8"%>

Hello World!

``` ### 14. idea右上角菜单栏->Edit Configuration -> 点击 + 号添加tomcat ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/10.png) ### 15. 点击Application server 后面的 Configure按钮 配置指向本地tomcat路径 ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/11.png) ### 16. 点击Deployment -> + 号 -> 你的项目的war包名称，例如demoWeb.war，修改下面的 Application context ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/12.png) ### 17. 在java目录下新建com/aias/admin/,建四个子包 action/bean/dao/service，在action中新建DemoController ``` package com.aias.admin.action; import org.springframework.stereotype.Controller; import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping; @Controller public class DemoController { @RequestMapping("/") public String hello() { return "index"; } } ``` ### 18. 点击run/debug启动tomcat ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/13.png) ### 19. 启动成功会自动弹出一个浏览器界面，则说明配置成功 ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/14.png) ### 20.新建数据库表t_user ``` DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `t_user`; CREATE TABLE `t_user` ( `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `user_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `password` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; -- ---------------------------- -- Records of t_user -- ---------------------------- INSERT INTO `t_user` VALUES ('1', '123456', '123456'); INSERT INTO `t_user` VALUES ('2', 'admin', 'admin'); ``` ### 21.修改相关代码如下： * com/aias/admin/bean/User.java ``` package com.aias.admin.bean; public class User { private Integer id; private String userName; private String password; public Integer getId() { return id; } public void setId(Integer id) { this.id = id; } public String getUserName() { return userName; } public void setUserName(String userName) { this.userName = userName; } public String getPassword() { return password; } public void setPassword(String password) { this.password = password; } } ``` * com/aias/admin/dao/IUserDao ``` package com.aias.admin.dao; import com.aias.admin.bean.User; import java.util.List; public interface IUserDao { public List listAllUser(); } ``` * com/aias/admin/bean/UserMapper.xml ``` ``` * com/aias/admin/service/IUserService.java ``` package com.aias.admin.service; import com.aias.admin.bean.User; import java.util.List; public interface IUserService { public List listAllUser(); } ``` * com/aias/admin/service/impl/UserServiceImpl.java ``` package com.aias.admin.service.impl; import com.aias.admin.bean.User; import com.aias.admin.dao.IUserDao; import com.aias.admin.service.IUserService; import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired; import org.springframework.stereotype.Service; import java.util.List; @Service public class UserServiceImpl implements IUserService { @Autowired private IUserDao userDao; @Override public List listAllUser() { return userDao.listAllUser(); } } ``` * com/aias/admin/action/DemoController.java ``` package com.aias.admin.action; import com.aias.admin.bean.User; import com.aias.admin.service.IUserService; import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON; import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired; import org.springframework.stereotype.Controller; import org.springframework.ui.Model; import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping; import java.util.List; @Controller public class DemoController { @Autowired private IUserService userService; @RequestMapping("/") public String hello() { return "index"; } @RequestMapping("/list") public String listUser(Model model) { List userList = userService.listAllUser(); model.addAttribute("userList", JSON.toJSONString(userList)); return "index"; } } ``` * webapp/jsp/index.jsp ``` <%@ page language="java" contentType="text/html; charset=UTF-8" pageEncoding="UTF-8"%>

Hello World!

${userList}
``` ### 23.在pom文件中添加打包mapper的插件 ``` org.apache.maven.plugins maven-compiler-plugin 1.8 1.8 maven-resources-plugin copy-xmls process-sources copy-resources ${basedir}/target/classes ${basedir}/src/main/java **/*.xml ``` ### 22.启动tomcat，启动完成之后访问http://localhost:8080/demo/list ![](start-ssm-project-by-idea/15.png) ### 配置完成

title: Supreme
content:
Welcome to [Hexo](https://hexo.io/)! This is your very first post. Check [documentation](https://hexo.io/docs/) for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in [troubleshooting](https://hexo.io/docs/troubleshooting.html) or you can ask me on [GitHub](https://github.com/hexojs/hexo/issues).

## 测试

### Create a new post

``` bash
$ hexo new "My New Post"
```

More info: [Writing](https://hexo.io/docs/writing.html)

### Run server

``` bash
$ hexo server
```

More info: [Server](https://hexo.io/docs/server.html)

### Generate static files

``` bash
$ hexo generate
```

More info: [Generating](https://hexo.io/docs/generating.html)

### Deploy to remote sites

``` bash
$ hexo deploy
```

More info: [Deployment](https://hexo.io/docs/deployment.html)
